full_text:
Sima Yong (Wenzai) 司馬顒 (文載)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Yong (司馬顒), styledWenzai (文載). The seventh of the Princes associated with the Turmoil of the Eight Princes. Sima Yong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
